message:
fix(mux-server): prevent cursor-row panic when cursor is beyond pane bounds

Replace lines.remove(0) with lines.into_iter().next() guarded by
if-let to handle empty get_lines() results gracefully. Change per_pane
map key from TabId to PaneId for semantic correctness. Use
saturating_add(1) for cursor range. Add test for missing cursor row.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
